footer.tagline: Built for farmer-first digital growth. PASUMAI CHOLAI.

landing.harvestDescription: Sourced from local fields and delivered with the freshness of morning dew. No intermediaries. No compromise.
landing.philosophyBody1: <0>Pasumai Cholai is a one-step, farmer-friendly platform powered by</0> AI intelligence.
landing.philosophyBody2: <0>Empowering farmers</0> <1>to thrive, grow, and earn</1> fair profits <2>with multilingual support. It ensures</2> farmers can access help in their own language.
landing.philosophyBody3: We believe a nation truly develops when its <0>farmers, those who feed the world, do not suffer in poverty</0>. Every small step we take is towards strengthening the lives of those who feed the world.
landing.storyBody1: Pasumai Cholai was started to help those who <0>struggle to survive</0> and <1>earn fair profits</1>. We ask everyone: “When will our country become a <2>nation that supports its farmers</2>?” This happens when <3>farmers stop dying in poverty</3>. “It’s not just the <4>farmer’s poverty</4>, it’s the <5>nation’s poverty</5>.”
landing.storyBody2: According to NCRB reports, <0>753,425 people</0> have died in India and <1>15,500 in Tamil Nadu</1> between 2000–2026. We came here to stop this <2>tragedy</2>.
landing.storyBody3: We are young and passionate, committed to <0>strengthening the lives of farmers</0> and ensuring <1>fair opportunities</1>.
landing.tamilQuote: <0>"The only one truly great in the world is the one who</0> <1>plows, sows, harvests,</1> <2>and feeds</2> <3>the whole world."</3>
landing.heroTitle: Modern agriculture ecosystem for farmers, experts, and buyers
landing.headline: Farmer-first ecosystem for market access, knowledge, support, and digital growth.

marketplace.title: Direct Crop Marketplace
marketplace.body: Farmers list produce and customers buy directly with transparent pricing.

support.body: Use grievance workflows, expert chat, and AI guidance in one platform.

ai.subtitle: Ask crop planning, weather adaptation, and soil health questions.

ai.sampleAnswer: Great, suggest nutrient mix for paddy this week.
